title: Noma Star Chef Rene Redzepi’s Abusive Tactics Resembled Those of a Cult Leader
summary: As L.A. prepares to host the world-renowned restaurant's $1,500-a-night pop up, Hollywood may find revelations of the creative visionary's violent temper all too familiar.

title: Lily Collins, Ted Danson, Naomi Osaka and More Hit the Desert for Annual Celebrity Tennis Tournament
summary: The sun was hot and the stars were out at the 22nd Desert Smash philanthropic event in La Quinta, California.
